features.crossPlatform.title: Cross-platform
features.crossPlatform.body: Runs on all major operating systems – Windows, MacOS and Linux.
features.importExport.title: Import, export, convert
features.importExport.body: Audacity supports all major audio formats, allowing you to convert WAV to MP3, FLAC, Ogg and much more.
features.plugins.title: Plugin support
features.plugins.body: Elevate your productions with a vast selection of third-party plugins, including VST3, Nyquist and more.
features.analysis.title: Deep audio analysis
features.analysis.body: Visualize frequencies in Audacity's Spectrogram view or use scientific Vamp analyzers to make discoveries.
faq.title: Popular in the FAQ
faq.a1: Audacity is the world's most popular free software for recording and editing audio. So if you're producing music, a podcast, or just playing around with audio, Audacity is for you.
faq.a2: Audacity is for anyone who wants to get creative with sound. It's also the perfect tool for anyone who needs to quickly edit or export audio, for any reason.
faq.a3: Yes! Audacity has always been and will always remain free for everyone.
faq.a4: Audacity is proudly open source. This means its source code remains open to anyone to view or modify. A dedicated worldwide community of passionate audio lovers have collaborated to make Audacity the well-loved software it is today.
download.title: Downloads
help.title: Help
help.intro: Pick a starting point. The manual covers everything in depth; the getting-started guides walk you through the basics; the community is here when you need a person.
help.gettingStartedDesc: Brand new to Audacity? Eight short steps from install to first export.
help.tutorialsDesc: Task-focused guides covering every common workflow: record, edit, effects, export, convert.
help.manualDesc: The complete reference for every menu, toolbar, and effect in Audacity 4.
help.faqDesc: Quick answers to the most common questions about Audacity.
help.forumDesc: Community discussion, troubleshooting, and feature talk.
help.discordDesc: Live chat with users, contributors, and the team.
help.githubDesc: Report a bug or request a feature on the Audacity repo.
404.body: Sorry, but we couldn't find the page that you were looking for...
cloud.title: Sign up to Audacity's cloud saving platform and access your projects from anywhere!
cloud.storage.title: Secure cloud storage
cloud.storage.body: Keep your projects safe and accessible with cloud storage. Access your work anywhere and never lose a file.
cloud.share.title: Share your creations
cloud.share.body: Upload and share your audio from Audacity with just a few clicks. Quick, easy, and built for creators.
cloud.transcribe.title: Transcribe your audio
cloud.transcribe.body: Free AI-powered transcription for your podcasts or voice overs, delivering fast and precise text for effortless editing.
cloud.explore.title: Explore new sounds
cloud.explore.body: Collaborate with other creators, find new inspiration, and discover sounds to enhance and elevate your projects.
audiodotcom.heading: Level up your Audacity
audiodotcom.body: Audio.com, the online companion to Audacity, lets you collaborate on projects, create versioned backups, and easily share and publish your work.
video.release.title: How we're building Audacity 4
video.release.label: A sneak peek at our development process and new features.
video.release.alt: Video thumbnail: How we're building Audacity 4
video.promo.label: Install once. Access tons of powerful plugins. Blend for infinite creativity.
